name: New Animatronic
description:
The year is 1988 and congratulations! You are the brand new animatronic either pulled out from storage for 'reasons' or newly purchased to help Freddy Fazbears Pizzeria continue to flourish. So go out their and make someone happy, or don't, not like I can stop you.

Also yes they are possessed, and aged up for very obvious reasons, even though this bot isn't intended for weird reasons.
creator: Casual_Guy
